productName: Stock Buddy Pure Skills Provider with Analytics Dashboard
executiveSummary: Transform Stock Buddy into a pure skills provider following Anthropic Agent Skills specification, where MCP clients provide their own stock data for analysis. The system stores all analysis results in a database and provides a web UI dashboard for viewing historical analysis, trends, and insights across all client requests.
problemStatement: MCP clients need reusable stock analysis skills that work with their own data sources, but currently lack a way to persist and visualize analysis results over time. Organizations want to track analysis history, identify patterns across multiple analyses, and build institutional knowledge from accumulated insights.
targetUsers: MCP client developers integrating stock analysis skills
Trading firms using multiple data sources
objectives: Provide pure analysis skills following Anthropic Agent Skills specification
Accept client-provided data for all analyses
Store analysis requests and results in database
Create web UI dashboard for viewing analysis history
Enable filtering and searching of past analyses
Generate insights from accumulated analysis data
Maintain skill reusability across different MCP clients
inScope: Pure skill implementation following Agent Skills spec
Client data input validation and processing
PostgreSQL database for storing analysis results
constraints: Must follow Anthropic Agent Skills specification exactly
Skills must remain stateless and pure
Cannot store client credentials or API keys
Must handle large volumes of analysis data
UI must be responsive and performant
ALL OUTPUTS MUST INCLUDE PROMINENT DISCLAIMERS
Must comply with financial regulations and best practices
Analysis must be reproducible and auditable
Must implement risk warnings and limitations
Must maintain calculation accuracy to 6 decimal places

requirements.title: Pure Agent Skills Implementation
requirements.description: Implement all 14 analysis skills as pure, reusable Agent Skills that accept client data as input and return analysis results, following Anthropic's Agent Skills specification with proper YAML frontmatter and metadata
requirements.rationale: Core requirement for reusable skills across MCP clients

requirements.title: Client Data Input Interface
requirements.description: Define clear data input contracts for each skill, accepting OHLCV, fundamentals, news, and other market data from MCP clients with comprehensive validation
requirements.rationale: Clients need clear contracts for providing data

requirements.title: Analysis Result Storage
requirements.description: Store all analysis requests and results in PostgreSQL database including client ID, timestamp, input data, analysis type, results, and metadata for historical tracking
requirements.rationale: Enable historical analysis and trend identification

requirements.title: Web Dashboard UI
requirements.description: Create React/Next.js web dashboard displaying analysis history, trends, statistics, and insights with interactive charts and filtering capabilities
requirements.rationale: Users need to visualize and explore analysis data

requirements.title: Analysis Search and Filter
requirements.description: Implement search functionality to find analyses by ticker, date range, analysis type, client, and result criteria with advanced filtering options
requirements.rationale: Users need to quickly find specific analyses

requirements.title: Trend Analytics
requirements.description: Generate trend analytics from accumulated analysis data showing patterns, frequently analyzed stocks, success rates, and aggregate insights over time
requirements.rationale: Identify patterns and insights from historical data

requirements.title: REST API for Data Access
requirements.description: Provide REST API endpoints for querying analysis history, statistics, and trends programmatically with pagination and filtering support
requirements.rationale: Enable programmatic access to stored data

requirements.title: Multi-Client Support
requirements.description: Support multiple MCP clients with client identification, separate data views, and client-specific analytics while maintaining data isolation
requirements.rationale: Different clients need isolated data views

requirements.title: Export Functionality
requirements.description: Enable export of analysis data in CSV, JSON, and PDF formats with customizable date ranges and filtering options
requirements.rationale: Users need to export data for reporting and analysis

requirements.title: Performance Optimization
requirements.description: Optimize database queries and UI rendering to handle millions of analysis records with sub-second response times using indexing, caching, and pagination
requirements.rationale: System must remain performant at scale

requirements.title: Real-time Updates
requirements.description: Implement WebSocket connections to show real-time analysis results in the dashboard as new analyses are performed by MCP clients
requirements.rationale: Live updates enhance user experience

requirements.title: Comparison Tools
requirements.description: Enable side-by-side comparison of multiple analyses for the same stock or across different stocks with visual diff highlighting
requirements.rationale: Users need to compare analysis results

requirements.title: Audit Logging
requirements.description: Implement comprehensive audit logging for all analysis requests, data access, and system operations for compliance and debugging
requirements.rationale: Required for compliance and troubleshooting

requirements.title: Data Retention Policies
requirements.description: Implement configurable data retention policies to automatically archive or delete old analysis data based on age or storage limits
requirements.rationale: Manage storage costs and compliance requirements

requirements.title: Dashboard Customization
requirements.description: Allow users to customize dashboard layout, create saved views, and configure preferred charts and metrics
requirements.rationale: Different users have different analysis needs

requirements.title: Financial Calculation Accuracy
requirements.description: Ensure all financial calculations maintain minimum 6 decimal place accuracy with proper rounding rules, handling of edge cases, and validation of calculation chains to prevent compound errors
requirements.rationale: Financial decisions require precise calculations to avoid material errors

requirements.title: Risk Disclaimers and Warnings
requirements.description: Display prominent, legally-compliant disclaimers on all analysis outputs stating 'NOT FINANCIAL ADVICE', 'PAST PERFORMANCE DOES NOT GUARANTEE FUTURE RESULTS', risk of loss warnings, and limitations of analysis
requirements.rationale: Legal requirement to protect users and organization from liability

requirements.title: Analysis Confidence Scoring
requirements.description: Provide confidence scores for each analysis component indicating data quality, calculation certainty, and limitations with clear explanation of what affects confidence levels
requirements.rationale: Users need to understand the reliability of analysis for decision-making

requirements.title: Calculation Transparency
requirements.description: Provide detailed calculation breakdowns showing formulas used, input values, intermediate steps, and final results with ability to verify and reproduce all calculations
requirements.rationale: Financial decisions require understanding and verification of calculations

requirements.title: Data Quality Validation
requirements.description: Implement comprehensive data quality checks including outlier detection, missing data handling, stale data warnings, and anomaly alerts before processing
requirements.rationale: Bad data leads to bad financial decisions

requirements.title: Scenario Analysis and Backtesting
requirements.description: Support what-if scenarios, sensitivity analysis, and historical backtesting with clear separation between historical facts and projections
requirements.rationale: Financial decisions benefit from understanding different scenarios

requirements.title: Regulatory Compliance Logging
requirements.description: Maintain immutable audit logs of all analyses, decisions, data sources, and calculations for regulatory review with timestamp, user, and version tracking
requirements.rationale: Financial regulators may require proof of decision basis

requirements.title: Error Bounds and Uncertainty
requirements.description: Calculate and display error bounds, standard deviations, and uncertainty ranges for all statistical calculations and projections
requirements.rationale: Financial decisions need to account for uncertainty

requirements.title: Market Hours Awareness
requirements.description: Implement market hours checks, pre/post-market data labeling, and warnings when using stale or after-hours data for analysis
requirements.rationale: Market timing affects data relevance and decision validity

requirements.title: Position Size and Risk Limits
requirements.description: Calculate maximum position sizes based on portfolio risk, implement Kelly Criterion, provide stop-loss recommendations, and enforce maximum exposure limits
requirements.rationale: Prevent catastrophic losses through proper position sizing

requirements.title: Conflict of Interest Disclosure
requirements.description: Require disclosure of any conflicts of interest, data source biases, or commercial relationships that might affect analysis objectivity
requirements.rationale: Transparency about potential biases is essential for trust

requirements.title: Version Control for Models
requirements.description: Maintain version history of all analysis models, formulas, and algorithms with ability to reproduce historical analyses using point-in-time versions
requirements.rationale: Financial models must be versioned for consistency and audit

requirements.title: Stress Testing Framework
requirements.description: Implement stress testing for extreme market conditions, black swan events, and correlation breakdowns with clear warnings about model limitations
requirements.rationale: Financial decisions must consider extreme scenarios

requirements.title: Data Lineage Tracking
requirements.description: Track complete data lineage from source through transformations to final analysis, enabling full traceability of how each result was derived
requirements.rationale: Financial decisions require understanding data provenance

requirements.title: Regulatory Report Generation
requirements.description: Generate standardized reports for regulatory compliance including MiFID II, best execution, and suitability assessments where applicable
requirements.rationale: Streamline regulatory compliance reporting

glossary.definition: A stateless, deterministic function that accepts input data and returns analysis results without side effects
Anthropic's standard format for reusable AI agent skills with YAML frontmatter and defined interfaces
The output from a skill execution including scores, ratings, metrics, and explanatory text
Unique identifier for each MCP client to enable data isolation and client-specific views
A configured arrangement of charts, tables, and metrics displaying analysis data

changes: Initial PRD for pure skills provider with analytics dashboard
Defined 15 requirements covering skills, storage, and UI
Established architecture for client data processing and result storage
